name: Steel Cutters
description: Heavy-duty steel bar cutting machines for construction rebar processing. Electric and hydraulic bar cutters for reinforced concrete preparation.

machines.name: Toyo TBC-32 Heavy Duty Rebar Cutting Machine
machines.shortDescription: Toyo TBC-32 heavy-duty electric rebar cutter rated 32 mm. Japanese precision bar cutting for construction steel preparation with hardened shear blades and foot pedal control.
machines.description: Toyo TBC-32 heavy-duty electric rebar cutter rated 32 mm. Japanese precision bar cutting for construction steel preparation with hardened shear blades and foot pedal control. Available for rent in Dubai with free delivery.

specifications.Blade Type: Hardened alloy shear blades — 4 cutting edges

features: 4-edge hardened shear blades — rotate to a fresh edge when dull, replace after all 4 edges used
32 mm capacity cuts the heaviest rebar used in bridge piers and high-rise column reinforcement
Foot pedal control with guard interlock — both hands free for bar feeding and collection
Adjustable roller support table aligns bar height to the shear automatically for straight cuts
3-second cycle time at 32 mm means 20 bars per minute for efficient batch cutting operations
Toyo Japanese build with close-tolerance blade guide that eliminates burr formation on cut ends

machines.name: Alba C-32 Electric Steel Bar Cutter
machines.shortDescription: Alba C-32 electric steel bar cutter with 32 mm capacity. Italian-designed machine for construction rebar cutting with mechanical clutch drive and automatic bar hold-down.
machines.description: Alba C-32 electric steel bar cutter with 32 mm capacity. Italian-designed machine for construction rebar cutting with mechanical clutch drive and automatic bar hold-down. Available for rent in Dubai with free delivery.

specifications.Drive: Mechanical clutch with flywheel energy storage
specifications.Safety: Transparent blade guard with interlock switch

features: Mechanical clutch with flywheel stores inertial energy for clean 32 mm cuts without motor stall
Automatic pneumatic bar clamp engages as the blade descends — bar cannot shift during the cut
2.5-second cut cycle is 20% faster than hydraulic equivalents for high-volume bar preparation
Transparent blade guard allows the operator to see the cut alignment while maintaining safety
Italian Alba gearmotor with oil-bath lubrication for continuous-duty bar cutting shop operation
210 kg with integrated wheelset for rolling between bar storage racks and the cutting station

machines.name: Gocmaksan H38 Hydraulic Steel Cutting Machine
machines.shortDescription: Gocmaksan H38 hydraulic steel cutter rated 38 mm diameter. Turkish heavy-duty hydraulic machine for the largest rebar and round bar cutting in construction and steel yards.
machines.description: Gocmaksan H38 hydraulic steel cutter rated 38 mm diameter. Turkish heavy-duty hydraulic machine for the largest rebar and round bar cutting in construction and steel yards. Available for rent in Dubai with free delivery.
features: 45 tonnes hydraulic cutting force at 38 mm — the highest-capacity bar cutter in the Fast Line fleet
2-stage hydraulic pump: rapid approach at low pressure, full 45 tonnes for the cutting stroke
Tungsten-carbide tipped blade lasts 5x longer than standard steel blades on high-tensile rebar
Oil cooler with thermostatic fan maintains hydraulic oil below 60°C in continuous production
310 kg floor-mounted with forklift pockets for positioning anywhere in the steel yard
38 mm capacity covers every rebar diameter specified in UAE structural engineering designs

machines.name: Hitachi CC14SF 14-Inch High-Speed Cut-Off Saw
machines.shortDescription: Hitachi CC14SF 14-inch high-speed cut-off saw with 2,000W motor. Portable abrasive and diamond cutting for rebar, steel sections, pipes, and metal profiles on construction sites.
machines.description: Hitachi CC14SF 14-inch high-speed cut-off saw with 2,000W motor. Portable abrasive and diamond cutting for rebar, steel sections, pipes, and metal profiles on construction sites. Available for rent in Dubai with free delivery.
features: 355 mm blade with 120 mm depth cuts through 100 mm steel I-beams in a single pass
Quick-release cam-lock vice secures round, square, and angle stock without tool adjustment
2,000W motor with soft-start prevents the breaker popping that plagues direct-start abrasive saws
Adjustable 0-45° mitre fence for cutting angle iron bracing and pipe saddles on site
Interchangeable abrasive and diamond blades — switch from rebar to steel sections in 2 minutes
17 kg with carry handle — portable between column positions on multi-storey construction
